The amendment to the Statutes approved by the Visitor shall be read as 'under the Statutes 11 (Executive Council) and 13 (Academic Council ) instead of 'under Section 23(1&2) and 24(1&2) of this University Act, 2006' respectively. Dr. RACHOB TABA, Registrar [ ADVT-III/4/Exty./191-R/14] -- 1 of 1 --
